data.current_description: Returns the albums belonging to the specified user
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all albums for a user
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all photosets (albums) belonging to the specified user. Requires a user ID as input. Returns an Album collection containing album metadata including title, description, photo count, and creation date. Results are paginated and can be sorted by various criteria.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity about input requirements (user ID parameter), output structure (Album objects, pagination), and filtering/sorting options. AI agents need to understand what user ID format is expected and how to handle paginated results.

message: Operation 'getAlbumByID' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Missing summary. Description is incomplete - doesn't specify that album ID is required, doesn't mention Photo schema objects returned, and omits pagination details. AI agents need clear input requirements and output structure to determine if this operation matches their intent.

data.current_description: Returns a list of photos in an album.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of Photo objects contained within a specified album (photoset). Requires the album ID as input. Returns Photo objects with metadata including title, description, URLs, and timestamps. Supports pagination parameters to control result size and offset.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is incomplete - doesn't specify that album ID is required, doesn't mention Photo schema objects returned, and omits pagination details. AI agents need clear input requirements and output structure to determine if this operation matches their intent.

data.current_description: Echos the input parameters back in the response
data.summary_suggestion: Echo test parameters for API validation
data.description_suggestion: A test utility operation that echoes back all provided input parameters in the response. Used for API connectivity testing and parameter validation. Accepts arbitrary key-value parameters and returns them unchanged. Useful for verifying API availability and request formatting without side effects.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks context about the operation's purpose (testing/validation). AI agents may not understand when to use this operation or that it's a diagnostic tool rather than a functional API call. Added clarity about its testing purpose and lack of side effects.

data.current_description: Uploads a new photo to Flickr
data.summary_suggestion: Upload a new photo to Flickr
data.description_suggestion: Uploads a new photo file to the user's Flickr account. Requires authentication and accepts image file data in the request body. Supports common image formats (JPEG, PNG, GIF). Returns a Photo object containing the uploaded photo's ID, URL, and metadata. The photo is initially private and can be made public through separate API calls. Requires valid authentication credentials.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks critical details: authentication requirement, supported file formats, expected request body structure, returned Photo object schema, and initial privacy state. AI agents need to understand authentication requirements, input format expectations, and the resulting photo's initial state to properly use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns an access token
data.summary_suggestion: Exchange request token for OAuth access token
data.description_suggestion: Exchanges an OAuth request token and verifier for an access token. Required for completing the OAuth authentication flow. data.current_description: Returns an oauth token and oauth token secret
data.description_suggestion: Initiates the OAuth authentication flow by returning a request token and secret. This is the first step of OAuth authorization. Requires consumer key and callback URL. Returns oauth_token and oauth_token_secret which must be used to redirect the user to the authorization page and subsequently exchanged for an access token.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks context about OAuth flow stage, required inputs (consumer key, callback), and the purpose of returned credentials. AI agents need to understand this is step one of OAuth and what to do with the returned values.

data.current_description: Returns next and previous favorites for a photo in a user's favorites
data.summary_suggestion: Get adjacent photos in user's favorites
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the next and previous photos in a user's favorites list relative to a specified photo. Useful for navigating through a user's favorite photos sequentially. Requires photo_id and user_id parameters. Returns ContextPhoto objects containing metadata for the adjacent photos in the favorites collection.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description doesn't specify required parameters (photo_id, user_id) or return type (ContextPhoto). AI agents need clarity on what inputs are required and what data structure is returned.
